channel.title: Llama on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Llama on jamesm.blog

item.title: Which Mac Studio Should You Buy for Running LLMs Locally?
item.description: A practical guide to Mac Studio configs for running popular free models locally (Qwen, LLaMA, Mixtral), realistic performance expectations, and which hardware actually makes sense.

item.title: Chatbots & Large Language Models (LLMs)
item.description: A practical explainer on the difference between chatbots and large language models, how modern model families fit together, and how to choose the right AI tool for a task.
